india_trends.title: NTPC, IndianOil, Coal India plan ₹6k-crore IPO for Hindustan Urvarak & Rasayan
india_trends.summary: NTPC, IndianOil and Coal India each hold a 29.67% stake in Delhi-headquartered Hindustan Urvarak &amp; Rasayan, which was formed in 2016 to set up urea plants in Sindri (Jharkhand), Barauni (Bihar) and Gorakhpur (Uttar Pradesh).

india_trends.title: Vodafone said to weigh move to transfer part of India unit stake to strengthen Vi balance sheet
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Group Plc is planning a capital boost for its Indian venture, Vodafone Idea Ltd. The UK telecom giant may transfer some of its shares to the Indian company. This move aims to strengthen Vodafone Idea's financial standing and aid its debt-raising efforts. The company is seeking significant l

india_trends.title: Texmaco bags Rs 187cr order from Kochi Metro, Vedanta
india_trends.summary: Texmaco Rail and Engineering Limited has secured new orders totaling Rs 187.37 crore. The company received a Rs 130.22 crore award from Kochi Metro Rail for ballastless track works on its Phase 2 project. Additionally, Texmaco secured a Rs 57.15 crore capex purchase order from Vedanta Aluminium.

india_trends.title: Will new-age companies break into large-cap indices?
india_trends.summary: Possible listing of NPCI, Sarvam.AI could boost India’s market-cap

india_trends.title: Samsung launches 5th edition flagship innovation, education programme in India
india_trends.summary: Samsung has launched its fifth Solve for Tomorrow programme in India. This initiative aims to empower young innovators to create technology solutions for real-world problems. The 2026 edition offers significant grants and incubation support. Top teams will receive substantial funding and mentorship.

india_trends.title: India joins global rally, but trails peers on earnings outlook: MOFSL
india_trends.summary: Crude prices and FPI outflows remain key market risks even as 94 percent of Nifty, BSE-200 stocks gained in April

india_trends.title: India, Canada to hold next round of FTA talks in Ottawa in July
india_trends.summary: India and Canada will hold the next round of free trade agreement negotiations in Ottawa in July. Both nations are committed to a balanced and ambitious pact to boost bilateral trade. Key issues like goods, services, and intellectual property will be discussed. The goal is to increase trade to $50 b

india_trends.title: Goldman Sachs' private credit fund cuts value by 3.7%
india_trends.summary: Goldman Sachs BDC reported net asset value ​per share (NAV) of $12.17 at the end of March, which is roughly 3.7% lower than the ​previous quarter, it said in a late Thursday filing.

india_trends.title: SBI pitches for review of affordable home definition, cites jump in average loan size
india_trends.summary: Chairman C S Setty said that the bank, which has the highest market share in the highly competitive affordable housing segment, has seen the average loan size increase to Rs 51 lakh now, compared to around Rs 35-40 lakh two years ago.

india_trends.title: Arisinfra Solutions posts FY26 revenue of Rs 1,067 crore
india_trends.summary: Arisinfra Solutions reported a 39% rise in FY26 revenue to Rs 1,067.5 crore, while profit surged over ten-fold to Rs 60.3 crore. Strong growth in contract manufacturing and Developer-as-a-Service businesses, improved margins and positive cash flow strengthened the company’s financial position.

india_trends.title: Hyundai India profit falls for second year as competition, costs weigh
india_trends.summary: The Gurugram-based Hyundai saw its consolidated net profit decline 4% to ₹5,432 crore, as margins took a 50-basis-point hit to end the financial year 2026 at 7.6%.

india_trends.title: Starbucks bullish on India growth story; opens first Reserve store in east India at Kolkata
india_trends.summary: Tata Starbucks sees strong long-term growth in India's coffee market. The company is expanding its presence with new Starbucks Reserve stores. India remains a fast-growing market for Starbucks, with plans for more outlets. The focus is on sustainable and profitable expansion. Coffee penetration in I

india_trends.title: Boston Scientific leases over 1.3 lakh sq ft office space in Pune’s Wakad
india_trends.summary: Boston Scientific has leased over 1.3 lakh sq ft of office space in Pune for its global capability centre, signing a nearly 9.5-year lease. The deal includes an option for further expansion, highlighting Pune's appeal for multinational firms seeking large office campuses and talent.

india_trends.summary: Equirus Securities

india_trends.title: Bank of England's Bailey sees 'wrestle' with US on stablecoin regulation
india_trends.summary: Bailey said he was concerned some U.S. stablecoins could not be readily turned into ​dollars without ​going through a ⁠crypto exchange, potentially limiting their convertibility in a crisis.But if stablecoins became widely used for cross-border payments, then during a crisis hard-to-convert ​U.S. st

india_trends.title: Northern Arc Capital Q4 profit jumps nearly 3-fold to Rs 139 cr
india_trends.summary: The NBFC firm had earned a net profit of Rs 47 crore in the same quarter a year ago.The total income rose to Rs 735 crore in the January-March period of the 2025-26 financial year from Rs 593 crore in the year-ago period, Northern Arc Capital said in a regulatory filing.

india_trends.title: Swiggy ditches growth for quick-commerce profitability, differentiation
india_trends.summary: Swiggy does not want to gain quick commerce market share through short-term fixes, instead focusing on differentiated offerings and a clear path to profitability.

india_trends.title: RBI eases rules for banks to include quarterly profits in regulatory capital
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Fifth Amendment Directions, 2026 said a bank may reckon the profits in the current financial year for capital to risk weighted assets ratio (CRAR) calculation on a quarterly basis subject to certain conditions, inclu

india_trends.title: Pulse of the Street: markets log modest weekly gains, but Iran tensions keep sentiment fragile
india_trends.summary: Equities ended marginally higher, but geopolitical tensions and crude volatility weighed on underlying sentiment this week. With global capital chasing AI-led opportunities elsewhere, earnings remain the only near-term anchor for markets.

india_trends.title: Ujjivan SFB Q4 profit jumps 238% on strong asset quality; CreditAccess Grameen PAT soars 7-fold
india_trends.summary: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank reported a 238% rise in Q4 net profit to Rs 282 crore, supported by business growth, improved asset quality and stronger collections. Deposits and assets under management expanded steadily, while the bank approved a Rs 2,000 crore fundraising plan for FY27.
